tools.name: getBalance
tools.description: Get SOL balance for the wallet (or a given address).

tools.name: getSplBalances
tools.description: List all SPL token balances for the wallet (or address).

tools.name: transferSol
tools.description: Send SOL to a recipient. Capped by manifest.config.maxTransferSol.

tools.name: transferSpl
tools.description: Send an SPL token to a recipient. Auto-creates recipient ATA.

tools.name: unwrapSol
tools.description: Close the wSOL ATA and reclaim SOL.

tools.name: getRecentSignatures
tools.description: Recent transaction signatures for the wallet (or address).
